title: Retirement Everest Film Features HK Solutions on Decumulation Risks
summary: Retirement Everest film examines the challenges of managing finances after retirement, featuring Keith Helmendach of HK Solutions.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of financial planning beyond just saving, addressing the complexities of spending in retirement.

title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves 2 Dead, Several Wounded
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and multiple injuries, according to the NC State Bureau of Investigation.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and gun violence in community spaces, prompting investigations and community response.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte as a hub for polymer technology and provides opportunities for industry professionals to learn and network.

title: Mecklenburg County Unveils $2.6 Billion Budget with No Property Tax Increase
summary: Mecklenburg County proposes a $2.6 billion budget focusing on affordable housing, mental health, public safety, and county worker pay raises.
charlotte_impact: Indicates the county's priorities in addressing key community needs without increasing the tax burden on residents.

title: Gas Line Explosion in Matthews Highlights Utility Crew Dangers
summary: A gas line explosion in Matthews underscores the risks faced by utility crews, with Mecklenburg County reporting numerous excavation-related utility strikes.
charlotte_impact: Draws attention to the need for improved safety measures and awareness to prevent utility accidents during excavation work.

title: I-77 Toll Debate Intensifies Ahead of Key Vote
summary: Debate over the I-77 toll project intensifies as the Charlotte Regional Transportation Planning Organization prepares for a crucial vote.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing community concerns and political maneuvering surrounding the controversial I-77 toll lane project.

title: Woman Pleads Guilty in 2025 North Charlotte Murder
summary: Rebecca Oxendine pleads guilty to killing a man in north Charlotte in January 2025 and will serve up to 17 years in prison.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to crime statistics and highlights the consequences of violent crime in the north Charlotte area.

title: Guilty Plea in 2024 Northeast Charlotte Homicide
summary: A guilty plea was entered in a 2024 homicide case that occurred in northeast Charlotte. The perpetrator was 17 at the time.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the issue of youth violence and its impact on the community, emphasizing the need for intervention and prevention.

title: Motorcyclist Seriously Injured in Troutman Crash
summary: A motorcyclist sustained serious injuries in a crash along Charlotte Highway near Interstate 77 in Troutman.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of the dangers of motorcycle accidents and the importance of road safety.

title: Teen Pleads Guilty to 2024 Deadly Shooting in Northeast Charlotte
summary: A teenager pleads guilty to a deadly shooting that occurred in northeast Charlotte along Tom Hunter Road near North Tryon Street in 2024.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence involving young people in the northeast Charlotte area.

title: SC DPH Investigates TB Exposure at Fort Mill Middle School
summary: The South Carolina Department of Public Health is investigating a tuberculosis exposure at Pleasant Knoll Middle School in Fort Mill.
charlotte_impact: Addresses public health concerns and the importance of disease control measures in schools.

title: 70s Thursday and Friday, but Heat Arrives This Weekend
summary: Weather forecast predicts mild temperatures for Thursday and Friday, followed by hotter and more humid conditions over the weekend.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather update relevant to daily planning and awareness of changing conditions.

title: City Council Cancels Special Meeting on I-77 Toll Lanes
summary: Charlotte City Council cancels a special meeting on the I-77 South Express Lanes project after initially pulling support.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the political complexities and shifting positions surrounding the controversial I-77 toll lane project.

title: Father Charged with Murder of 8-Month-Old Baby
summary: Nieves Alexander Acosta-Maldonado is charged with the murder of his 8-month-old baby after confessing to shaking him.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a tragic case of child abuse and homicide, raising serious concerns about child welfare and safety.

title: 1 Dead in Head-On Crash in Indian Trail
summary: A head-on collision in Indian Trail resulted in one fatality and one serious injury, according to officials.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of traffic accidents and the importance of safe driving practices.
